meaning: n.混血儿,<美>有八分之一黑人血统的混血儿,杂种动物
examples: A metis in Canada is the offspring of an Amerindian and a white person.
Metis: the ability to see patterns in the world and derive a gist from complex situations.
Peter High is the President of Metis Strategy, a business and IT advisory firm.
With marriage a social obligation, many metis and homosexuals do wed, but others - with great difficulty - tell their families they cannot.
